title: Show all milestone points and revert vision board to version 28 layout

requirements.summary: Ensure all milestone points for each goal are fully visible in VisionBoard.tsx without any hidden, collapsed, or truncated milestones
acceptanceCriteria: Every milestone associated with a goal is displayed in the UI without any 'show more' toggle or item limit
Adding multiple milestones to a goal shows all of them rendered in the list
No milestone items are hidden or clipped due to overflow or conditional rendering

file_operations.description: Remove any conditional rendering logic that limits milestone display (e.g., slice, take, show-more toggles). Ensure the milestone list renders all items from the milestones array without truncation. Update the milestone rendering section to map over the full milestones array and display each milestone item in the list.

requirements.summary: Revert VisionBoard.tsx page to version 28 layout, interaction patterns, and visual design, undoing the version 36 milestone plus-button pattern and restoring the original per-line milestone input fields
acceptanceCriteria: The vision board page layout matches the version 28 design, not the version 36 changes
Milestone input uses the original per-line input field pattern from version 28, not the plus-button pattern introduced in version 36
All goal categories, cards, and controls appear and behave as they did in version 28
The partner read-only tab remains functional after the revert

file_operations.description: Revert the entire VisionBoard component to the version 28 implementation. Replace the current milestone plus-button interaction pattern (introduced in version 36) with the original per-line milestone input field approach from version 28. Restore the original goal card layout, category rendering, and all UI controls as they appeared in version 28. Ensure the partner read-only tab logic remains intact and functional. Keep the backend integration points (useGetVisionBoardEntries, useSaveOrUpdateVisionBoardEntry, useDeleteVisionBoardEntry hooks) unchanged since this is a frontend-only revert.
